user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Power Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense breakfast bowl combining antioxidant-rich berries, leafy greens, omega-3 chia, protein-packed Greek yogurt, and a sprinkle of seeds and nuts for sustained energy.
fields.meal_suggestion: Layer 3/4 cup plain Greek yogurt (or a plant-based yogurt) with 1/2 cup mixed berries (blueberries, strawberries), a handful of baby spinach or kale (finely chopped), 2 tablespoons chia seeds, 2 tablespoons ground flaxseed, and 2 tablespoons chopped mixed nuts (walnuts/almonds). Drizzle with 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup if desired and finish with a few slices of banana and a dusting of cinnamon. Serve immediately for creaminess or let sit 5–10 minutes to soften the chia seeds.
fields.nutrition_note: Combines high-quality protein from Greek yogurt, fiber and antioxidants from berries and leafy greens, omega-3 ALA from chia and flaxseed, and healthy fats from nuts. This bowl supports satiety, heart and brain health, and provides a concentrated nutrient boost as a morning meal.

result.reasoning: No specific position requested; appending (position -1) adds the superfood option alongside existing breakfast choices. The bowl complements current offerings by providing a concentrated, nutrient-dense alternative.
